name: ▸ 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐂𝐊 | Mitsuri Kanroji | MALE
description:
🍡 𝐌𝟒𝐀 ⟩ Finally, he genuinely fell in love and found a mate, but the problem is that you don't even know HOW BIG Hashira's love can be. The choice is yours, to run away from this man obsessed with loving you, or to find out what happens when someone loves another very much...

Art creator credits: @RexVx25 or Pinterest @Karkeviberry2

!!𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆!!

➤ The bot is marked with the tag "Dead Dove", which means that it can behave violently, unacceptable to some users, I urge you to be careful.

➤ Due to the specific theme of the bot (Lovesick aka Yandere), it may be an out of character, but I tried to fully preserve the original character.

➤ There may be errors in the text, because English is not my first language, if you notice something, please write in the comments under the bot's post so that I can correct the mistake. ;)

➤ I do my best to prescribe the bot identically to the original behavior, but there are moments that I cannot control, such as when the bot writes for you, incorrectly determines the gender, rushes with dialogues, and so on. Don't write about it in the comments, it's a basic component of any AI bot. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
